message:
fix: detect zombie tmux sessions in gt polecat list

polecat list previously only discovered polecats via filesystem directory
scan, missing zombie tmux sessions that persist after worktree deletion
(incomplete nuke or session naming mismatch). Now also scans for
gt-{rig}-* tmux sessions without matching worktree directories and
displays them with zombie state in red.

Closes gt-l1m1d

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
